name: Ossie Davis
description: American actor, director, poet, playwright, writer, and social activist (1917-2005)
abstract: Ossie Davis (born Raiford Chatman Davis; December 18, 1917 – February 4, 2005) was an American actor, director, writer, and activist. He was married to Ruby Dee, with whom he frequently performed, from 1948 until his death.
